title: AnalyseLoadCases
description: AnalyseLoadCases: Used to instruct the external software to run an Analysis on certain load cases.

LoadCases.description: This should contain Loadcases, Loadcombinations or identifiers of a type compatible with the specific Toolkit in use.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
